title: GatewayZ System Quality Pillars
description: Comprehensive System Quality Dashboard - 8 Quality Pillars leveraging Metrics, Logs, Traces, and Profiles for rapid incident response and usage analytics

options.content:
# GatewayZ System Quality Dashboard

**Purpose**: Multi-pillar incident response and usage analytics leveraging **Metrics · Logs · Traces · Profiles**

| Pillar | Focus | Key Panels |
|--------|-------|------------|
| 🛡️ **Reliability** | Error rates, SLO compliance, MTTR | Error budget, failed traces, critical logs |
| ⚡ **Performance** | Latency P50/P95/P99, TTFC, throughput | Latency percentiles, slow traces, CPU profiling |
| 📈 **Scalability** | Concurrency, cache, token throughput | Popular models/providers/endpoints, traffic patterns |
| ✅ **Availability** | Provider health, circuit breakers | Health scores, SLO burn rate, failover status |
| 🔍 **Observability** | Trace ingestion, log volume, cardinality | Pipeline health, most popular operations |
| 🔧 **Fault Tolerance** | Error recovery, retry patterns | Circuit breaker events, velocity mode, refunds |
| 🔒 **Security** | Auth failures, rate limits, anomalies | Auth failure trends, suspicious IPs, blocked customers |
| 🛠️ **Maintainability** | Exception tracking, code performance | Unhandled exceptions, memory profiling, cost per request |

**Usage**: Collapsed rows allow focus on specific quality pillars during incidents. Each section combines real-time metrics with contextual logs, traces, and profiling data.

panels.title: 🛡️  Reliability — MTTR · MTBF · Error Budget · SLO Compliance
CPU Profile (Live)
panels.description: Live CPU flamegraph showing which functions consume CPU time. Use during performance degradation to identify bottlenecks.

panels.title: 📈  Scalability — Concurrency · Cache Performance · Token Throughput
✅  Availability — Provider Health · Circuit Breakers · Failover Status
🔍  Observability — Trace Ingestion · Log Volume · Metric Cardinality
🔧  Fault Tolerance — Error Recovery · Retry Patterns · Graceful Degradation
🔒  Security — Auth Failures · Rate Limits · Anomaly Detection
🛠️  Maintainability — Technical Debt · Code Performance · System Complexity
Memory Profile (Live Allocations)
panels.description: Live memory allocation flamegraph. Shows which functions are allocating the most memory. Use during memory leak investigations.
